QueryExtension.SQL: SELECT CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", CO.CO_NUMBER AS "CO.CO_NUMBER", CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "CO.DEBTOR_NAME", CO.CO_STATUS AS "CO.CO_STATUS", (SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RETENTION_TYPE = 'AO/CAEO') AS "MONIES_IN_COURT", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CO' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND NVL(PY.OVERPAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0) > 0 AND PY.OVERPAYEE_NAME IS NULL) AS "UNRES_OVRPAY", CO.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CO_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode} AND CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
